title: Back up MAP and optimize folder structure
description: Operator requested the next assignment after gap-fill work: create a fresh backup of MAP, then clean up and optimize the MAP folder structure without erasing history or moving shared files silently. Start with a durable inventory/plan, preserve rollback path, and route any ambiguous or high-risk structural moves through review.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh post-TASK-129 MAP backup exists under Projects/Backups with timestamped path and verification metadata
Folder-structure inventory identifies active, historical, duplicate, misplaced, and candidate-move paths using existing MAP routing rules
Any cleanup/optimization changes are scoped, reversible, and documented in a report before review
Task graph/events validators pass after backup and any structure changes
